recommended_title: Post Work Bundle Admission Ring V0.2 schema enforcement and closure updater
rationale: V0.1 creates structural contracts, schemas, templates, receipts, and a runnable checker.
V0.2 should add full JSON Schema validation or a local schema validator, stronger git closure handling, and optional post-push external proof archiving.
V0.2 should integrate the post-work checker into the normal task closure route.
